summary: Added safeJsonParse helper and replaced all unguarded JSON.parse calls in file-read paths in central-config.js and central-config-state.js
notes: TDD fix: safeJsonParse(src, fallback, label) returns fallback on non-string, empty, or invalid JSON input. Replaced 9 JSON.parse call sites in file-read paths. Critical fix: line 363 in central-config-state.js (restoreSnapshot) was completely unguarded. 4 new tests, 27 total pass.
